note: All 21-25 year endpoint windows remain positive for Annual, Dry, and Wet NDVI.
The early and late subperiods should be reported as a sensitivity check, not as replacement for the full-period trend because each subperiod has fewer years.
The GLS AR(1) model with standardized climate covariates tests whether the time trend persists after precipitation, temperature, and solar radiation are included.
Use the endpoint sensitivity table/figure and climate-adjusted GLS table as reviewer-defense material; put detailed tables in Supplementary Materials if the main text is tight.
